product.name: FRIXCHUR Small Chandelier Semi Flush Mount Ceiling Light Fixture Chrome Crystal Ceiling Lighting Modern Crystal Ceiling Light Fixture for Hallway Closet Kitchen Island Dining Room Bedroom E26 Base

【Flush Mounted Crystal Ceiling Light】Voltage:AC110-260V.The small and single head chandelier is compatible with E26 bulb(Max 60W,BULB NOT INCLUDED).
【Mini Crystal Chandelier】The lampshade is composed of long crystal strips and iron cage,creating a sense of stunning and comfortable ambience to the surrounding space.

【Recommended Room Size】Crystal light fixture suitable for 5-10sq,perfect for closet,balcony,aisle,porch,living room,bedroom,laundry room,stairway,funky apartment,restaurant,entryway,salon,cafe and office, etc.
【Easy Installation】 The small modern ceiling light is securely wrapped and easily installed,only takes a few minutes to put it up.Please feel free to contact us if any questions.
